languages.text: "Стать частью большего! Не презираемыми штрафниками, а теми, кто искупил! Кто выжил! Кто смог!" {n}Люди кивают словам Дунавски и смотрят на вас, не скрывая восхищения.{/n}

"To become part of a greater cause! Not as despised penal outcasts, but as those who have found atonement! Those who survived! Those who prevailed!" {n}The crowd nods in agreement with Dunawski, their eyes fixed on you with open admiration.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Стать частью большего! Не презираемыми штрафниками, а теми, кто искупил! Кто выжил! Кто смог!" {n}Люди кивают словам Дунавски и смотрят на вас, не скрывая восхищения.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "To join a greater cause! Not as despised penal outcasts, but as those who have found atonement! Those who survived! Those who prevailed!" {n}The crowd nods in agreement with Dunawski, their eyes fixed on you with open admiration.{/n}

"To become part of a greater cause! Not as despised penal outcasts, but as those who have found atonement! Those who survived! Those who prevailed!" {n}The crowd nods in agreement with Dunawski, their eyes fixed on you with open admiration.{/n}

languages.text: “投身于更伟大的事业！不再做被人唾弃的流放犯，而是完成赎罪的人！幸存下来的人！取得胜利的人！”{n}人群纷纷点头赞同杜纳芙斯卡的话，他们的视线落在你身上，毫不掩饰他们眼中的钦佩。{/n}
languages.original_text: "To become part of a greater cause! Not as despised penal outcasts, but as those who have found atonement! Those who survived! Those who prevailed!" {n}The crowd nods in agreement with Dunawski, their eyes fixed on you with open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “投身于更伟大的事业！不再做被人唾弃的流放犯，而是完成赎罪的人！幸存下来的人！取得胜利的人！”{n}人群纷纷点头赞同杜纳芙斯卡的话，他们的视线落在你身上，毫不掩饰他们眼中的钦佩。{/n}

languages.text: "Daha büyük bir amaca dâhil olmak! Hor görülen sürgün mahkûmlar olarak değil, kefaretini ödemişler olarak! Hayatta kalanlar olarak! Galip gelenler olarak!" {n}Gözleri açık bir şekilde sana sabitlenmiş olan kalabalık, Dunawski'yle aynı fikirde olduklarını belirterek başlarını sallıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "To become part of a greater cause! Not as despised penal outcasts, but as those who have found atonement! Those who survived! Those who prevailed!" {n}The crowd nods in agreement with Dunawski, their eyes fixed on you with open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Daha büyük bir amaca dâhil olmak! Hor görülen sürgün mahkûmlar olarak değil, kefaretini ödemişler olarak! Hayatta kalanlar olarak! Galip gelenler olarak!" {n}Gözleri açık bir şekilde sana sabitlenmiş olan kalabalık, Dunawski'yle aynı fikirde olduklarını belirterek başlarını sallıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Pour rejoindre une noble cause ! Non pas comme des criminels parias, mais comme des expiés ! Des survivants ! Des vainqueurs ! » {n}La foule hoche en signe d'approbation, leurs yeux admiratifs rivés sur vous.{/n}
languages.original_text: "To become part of a greater cause! Not as despised penal outcasts, but as those who have found atonement! Those who survived! Those who prevailed!" {n}The crowd nods in agreement with Dunawski, their eyes fixed on you with open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Pour rejoindre une noble cause ! Non pas comme des criminels parias, mais comme des expiés ! Des survivants ! Des vainqueurs ! » {n}La foule hoche en signe d'approbation, leurs yeux admiratifs rivés sur vous.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Para ser parte de una causa mayor! ¡No como parias penales, sino como personas expiadas! ¡Como supervivientes! ¡Como triunfadores!». {n}La multitud asiente, de acuerdo con Dunawski, y sus miradas se fijan en ti, llenas de admiración.{/n}
languages.original_text: "To become part of a greater cause! Not as despised penal outcasts, but as those who have found atonement! Those who survived! Those who prevailed!" {n}The crowd nods in agreement with Dunawski, their eyes fixed on you with open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Para ser parte de una causa mayor! ¡No como parias penales, sino como personas expiadas! ¡Como supervivientes! ¡Como triunfadores!». {n}La multitud asiente, de acuerdo con Dunawski, y sus miradas se fijan en ti, llenas de admiración.{/n}

languages.text: "Um Teil einer größeren Sache zu werden! Nicht als verachtete Sträflinge, sondern als Soldaten, die Erlösung fanden. Als Überlebende! Als Sieger!" {n}Die Menge nickt bei Dunawskis Worten zustimmen und betrachtet dich mit offener Bewunderung.{/n}
languages.original_text: "To become part of a greater cause! Not as despised penal outcasts, but as those who have found atonement! Those who survived! Those who prevailed!" {n}The crowd nods in agreement with Dunawski, their eyes fixed on you with open admiration.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Um Teil einer größeren Sache zu werden! Nicht als verachtete Sträflinge, sondern als Soldaten, die Erlösung fanden. Als Überlebende! Als Sieger!" {n}Die Menge nickt bei Dunawskis Worten zustimmen und betrachtet dich mit offener Bewunderung.{/n}

languages.text: 「より大いなる大義の一翼を担うのだ！ 蔑まれた懲罰の追放者としてではなく、贖罪を見出した者として！ 生き延びた者として！ 打ち勝った者として！」{n}群衆はドゥナフスキーに同意してうなずき、その目はあからさまな賞賛をたたえて、あなたに注がれている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "To become part of a greater cause! Not as despised penal outcasts, but as those who have found atonement! Those who survived! Those who prevailed!" {n}The crowd nods in agreement with Dunawski, their eyes fixed on you with open admiration.{/n}
